chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.70 of 2021 Sohail Ilyas Versus M/s Silk Bank Limited & others Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 14.03.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last three dates appellant and his counsel are not attending these proceedings and today is fourth date when the matter is fixed for non-prosecution as compliance has not been made since day one and the appellant and his counsel are called absent. There is no intimation either. It appears that they have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
